options.name: --json-output
options.description: Path to JSON file rather than stdout

options.name: --check-github
options.description:
If provided delice will attempt to look up the
license via the GitHub API (provided it's GitHub
hosted)

options.description:
A GitHub Personal Access Token to perform

options.name: --check-license-content
options.description:
When set delice will attempt to look at the license
text and match it against some known license
templates

options.name: --refresh-spdx
options.description: Refreshes the SPDX license.json file used by the tool

options.name: --similarity
options.description:
The level of similarity to apply when comparing
license contents to the SPDX templates

arguments.description: The path to a .sln, .slnx, .csproj or .fsproj file,
